title: Definition - Building, Enclosed
description: Definition and criteria for enclosed buildings

data.rule: BUILDING, ENCLOSED: A building that has the total area of openings in each wall that receives positive external pressure less than or equal to 4 ft² (0.37 m²) or 1% of the area of that wall, whichever is smaller
data.then: Use whichever is smaller: 4 ft² (0.37 m²) or 1% of wall area
